title: Windows Credential Access Tool Cluster (Grouping)
description: Groups credential access tool indicators by host and user to identify active credential harvesting campaigns. When multiple credential dumping techniques (Mimikatz, LSASS access, Kerberoasting, NTDS.dit) appear on the same host, it indicates systematic credential theft. Uses grouping (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Grouping method).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Command Line' like '*sekurlsa*') or ('Command Line' like '*lsass*') or ('Command Line' like '*mimikatz*') or ('Command Line' like '*procdump*lsass*') or ('Command Line' like '*comsvcs*MiniDump*') or ('Command Line' like '*kerberoast*') or ('Command Line' like '*ntds*') or ('Command Line' like '*WDigest*')) | stats count as cred_events, distinctcount('Command Line') as unique_techniques by 'Host Name', User | sort -cred_events
